meaning: n.溢出,溅出,摔下,木片,小塞子,暴跌,溢出量vt.使溢出,使散落,洒,使流出,使摔下,倒出vi.溢出,涌流,充满
examples: The tanker began to spill its cargo of oil.
Someone jogged her elbow, making her spill her coffee.
Although I poured it carefully, I still managed to spill some.
For example, back in March, when there was the biggest oil spill in Prudhoe Bay history.
Seconds after it consumes a spill, the powder balls up and floats away for easy recovery.
